data.body:
COMPLETION-VERIFIER EVIDENCE (AC3 proof recipe defeated by line-wrap, requirement genuinely met). The advisory-remediation mandate IS loosened to judgment in BOTH skill files — the softened wording is present, merely wrapped across two lines so the AC's line-based 'grep -rn' returns nothing:
- examples/claude-skills/rebar-implement/SKILL.md:136-137 — line 136 ends '...apply the advisory findings' and line 137 continues 'that genuinely improve the plan...'.
- examples/claude-skills/rebar-brainstorm/SKILL.md:135-136 — line 135 ends '...apply the advisory findings that genuinely' and line 136 continues 'improve the plan before claiming'.
A wrap-tolerant proof confirms the loosening in both files:
  grep -rn 'apply the advisory findings' examples/claude-skills/    # -> both SKILL.md files
  grep -rzoP 'apply the advisory findings that genuinely\s+improve the plan' examples/claude-skills/*/SKILL.md   # -> matches both (multiline)
Neither file any longer MANDATES remediating ALL advisories: the old imperative ('remediate findings before claiming' / 'remediate ALL valid advisories') is replaced by the judgment-framed 'apply the advisory findings that genuinely improve the plan'. The substantive AC (loosen the mandate in both skills) is met; only the single-line grep recipe was fragile to prose reflow.
